title: All Natural Coconut Oil Deodorant | 2oz
productDescription: A compact roll-on deodorant bottle, approximately 2 fl oz (60ml), with a tall, slim cylindrical shape and a smooth white snap-on cap that sits flush with the body. The container is white with a matte plastic finish, featuring a clean minimalist label with the brand name "real SKIN CARE" in lowercase serif/sans-serif text near the top, a botanical illustration in the center representing the scent, and the product name in bold lowercase text above "natural deodorant" in smaller type, all set against a white background with a black band at the bottom of the label. The overall proportions are roughly 4-5 inches tall and about 1.5 inches in diameter, giving it a sleek, modern personal-care aesthetic. The cap is a solid white dome shape that is slightly wider than the bottle body, and the overall look is clean, minimal, and wellness-oriented.

title: Coconut Moisturizer | 4oz
productDescription: A short, wide-mouth plastic jar approximately 4 oz in size with a flat, ribbed black screw-on cap. The jar body is white with a matte finish and features a white label with a coconut illustration, the brand name "real SKIN CARE" in small text above the product name "coconut breeze" in lowercase bold black lettering, with "moisturizing body cream" in smaller text beneath and "4 fl. oz • 118ml" at the bottom. The jar has a squat, cylindrical proportion where the width is noticeably greater than the height, giving it a compact, sturdy appearance. A thick black horizontal band runs across the middle of the label separating the brand logo area from the product name.

title: Coconut Oil Toothpaste | Fluoride Free | 4oz
productDescription: A white, opaque plastic squeeze bottle with a black flip-top cap, approximately 4 oz in size with slim, cylindrical proportions similar to a travel-sized lotion bottle. The label features a clean, minimalist white design with the brand name "real SKIN CARE" in lowercase serif/sans-serif text at the top, a small circular emblem in the center, a botanical/spice illustration in the middle, and bold lowercase product name text above the word "toothpaste" separated by a black horizontal band. The bottle has a smooth, semi-matte plastic finish and stands about 5 inches tall with a straight-sided, narrow profile.

title: Foam Soap Bundle
productDescription: A bundle of three bottles: two smaller 8 fl. oz. foaming pump bottles flanking one larger 32 fl. oz. refill bottle in the center. All bottles are translucent/frosted white plastic with a semi-glossy finish; the two smaller bottles have dark charcoal-gray foam pump dispensers, while the larger refill bottle has a simple black screw-on cap. Each bottle features a clean white label with the brand name "real SKIN CARE" in minimalist lowercase serif typography at the top, a circular "Organic Coconut Oil + Essential Oils" badge, a realistic fruit or botanical illustration (varying by scent), and the scent name in large bold lowercase text above "hand soap" in a lighter weight. The overall aesthetic is modern, minimal, and clean with a white-dominant color palette accented only by the dark pump tops and the natural-colored botanical imagery on the labels.

title: Foam Soap Refill | 32oz
productDescription: A tall, cylindrical 32oz white plastic refill bottle with a flat black screw-on cap and smooth, glossy finish. The bottle has a clean, minimalist white label centered on the front featuring the "real SKIN CARE" brand name in elegant serif font, a small circular "Organic Coconut Oil & Essential Oils" badge, a botanical/fruit illustration specific to the scent variant, the scent name in bold lowercase type, "hand soap" in lighter text below, and "refill bottle" in a small outlined box near the bottom. The bottle has a slightly squared-off cylindrical shape with subtle vertical panel ridges visible on the sides, and the overall aesthetic is clean, modern, and pharmacy-minimal with a predominantly white-on-white color scheme.

title: Foaming Liquid Coconut Oil Soap | 8oz
productDescription: An 8oz frosted semi-transparent plastic foaming pump bottle with a tall, slim cylindrical shape. The bottle has a black foaming pump dispenser with a clear protective overcap. The label is white with a clean, minimalist design featuring the brand name "real SKIN CARE" in lowercase serif/sans-serif typography at the top, a small circular "Organic Coconut Oil & Essential Oils" badge in the center, a fruit or botanical illustration corresponding to the scent variant, and the scent name in bold lowercase text above "hand soap" in smaller type, with a black horizontal accent bar separating the scent name from the product type. The bottom of the bottle features a black band area, and the overall aesthetic is modern, clean, and spa-like with a matte-to-satin finish on the bottle body.

title: Moisturizing Coconut Soap | 3.4oz
productDescription: A round, puck-shaped bar of soap (3.4 oz / 84g) wrapped in white pleated paper with crimped edges, resembling a hotel-style wrapped soap disc. The flat top features a circular white label with clean, minimalist typography in black, the "real SKIN CARE" brand name, a small "MADE WITH ORGANIC COCONUT OIL" badge, and a botanical illustration as a central visual element. The label has small text running along its circular border noting ingredients and claims, with a subtle, elegant layout. The overall finish is clean white and matte, with a soft, natural aesthetic.

title: Natural Coconut Oil Lip Balm | 0.15oz | Four Pack
productDescription: A set of four standard-sized lip balm twist-up tubes (0.15 oz each) with smooth, matte white plastic bodies and black plastic caps. Each tube features a clean, minimalist white label with the brand name "real SKIN CARE" in lowercase modern typography, along with a small illustrative icon matching the scent (coconut, vanilla, leaf, tangerine) and the scent name printed vertically in lowercase brown/black text. The tubes are slim, cylindrical, and approximately 2.75 inches tall with a standard lip balm diameter. The overall aesthetic is natural, clean, and modern with a white-and-black color scheme accented by subtle fruit/botanical illustrations.

title: Non-Toxic Body Lotion Made With Only 6 Clean Ingredients
productDescription: An 8 fl. oz. (236ml) white plastic cylindrical squeeze bottle with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and a black flip-top or disc cap. The bottle has a clean, minimalist white label featuring the brand name "real SKIN CARE" in simple black lowercase/uppercase text near the top, a small circular badge noting "Organic Coconut Oil + Essential Oils," a centered botanical or ingredient illustration, and the scent/variant name in bold black lowercase text above "moisturizing body lotion" in smaller type. The overall proportions are a standard tall, slim lotion bottle shape, roughly 7–8 inches tall, with the label covering most of the front surface and a black horizontal accent bar behind the variant name text. The design aesthetic is clean, natural, and modern with a predominantly white, black, and green color palette.

title: Sensitive Skin Starter Set
productDescription:
**Sensitive Skin Starter Set by Real Skin Care — Pure Unscented:**

The set consists of three items: a tall, slim cylindrical squeeze bottle (8 fl oz) of moisturizing body lotion with a black flip-top cap; a short, wide cylindrical jar (4 fl oz) of moisturizing body cream with a black screw-on lid; and a round, flat disc-shaped hand & body soap bar wrapped in white packaging. All containers are white with a clean, minimalist matte-finish label featuring the "real SKIN CARE" brand name in lowercase black serif/sans-serif typography, a small green leaf illustration with a water droplet, and a dark charcoal-gray banner strip across the middle reading "pure unscented" in white text. The overall aesthetic is clinical yet natural, with smooth white plastic containers that convey a fragrance-free, sensitive-skin focus.

title: Two-Step Dry Skin Starter Set
productDescription: The set includes two products: a tall, slim cylindrical squeeze bottle (8 fl. oz / 236ml) of moisturizing body lotion with a black flip-top cap, and a shorter, wide-mouth round jar (4 fl. oz / 118ml) of moisturizing body cream with a black ribbed screw-on lid. Both containers are white/translucent plastic with a clean, minimalist label design featuring the "real SKIN CARE" brand in black script and sans-serif font, the product name "coconut breeze" in lowercase black text, a black horizontal stripe accent, and realistic coconut imagery with green leaves. The overall aesthetic is modern and minimal with a monochromatic black-and-white color scheme, matte-finish containers, and a cohesive visual identity across both pieces.
